description: OAuth client thumbnail update: strict base64 rejection agrees, confirm gate, and the PUT once confirmed (binary body, so only method/path pinned). Missing client_id and missing-thumbnail texts diverge (see report).

cases.name: rejects invalid base64
cases.expect_error: thumbnail_png_base64 must be valid standard base64

cases.name: requires confirm before updating thumbnail
cases.expect_error: This updates an OAuth client thumbnail. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates an OAuth client thumbnail. Set confirm=true to proceed.
